name: Kapwing
description: Kapwing — Online video editor with subtitles, trimming, effects, and team collaboration for short-form content.

seo.title: Kapwing — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Kapwing: Kapwing — Online video editor with subtitles, trimming, effects, and team collaboration for short-form content.

when_to_use: Collaborative online video editing for content creators
Adding captions and subtitles to short-form video content
Team-based short video production for social media
Trimming and repurposing long-form videos for social clips
No-install browser-based video editor for marketing teams

pros: AI subtitles and auto-translate built in
cons: Not a developer tool — UI-driven only
Render quality capped for fast turnaround
Feature list churns, breaking old workflows
Watermarks on free tier obscure branding
Limited control vs pro desktop editors
review.verdict: Great team video editor for social and marketing — but fits awkwardly in a developer-tools catalog.
review.best_for: Marketing and social teams producing subtitled short-form content collaboratively.
review.not_for: Developers — this is an end-user editor, not an API.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
